name: siteclone
description: Clone any website to a static HTML/JS folder. Desktop app for Mac and Windows. Handles WordPress and dynamic sites via headless Chromium.
author: Harry Wang

scripts.electron:dev: npm run build && npm run electron:prepare && electron .
scripts.electron:build: rm -rf dist-electron electron/server && npm run build && npm run electron:prepare && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:mac: rm -rf dist-electron electron/server && npm run build && npm run electron:prepare && electron-builder --mac --publish never --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:win: rm -rf dist-electron electron/server && npm run build && npm run electron:prepare && electron-builder --win --publish never --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:all: rm -rf dist-electron electron/server && npm run build && npm run electron:prepare && electron-builder --mac --win --config electron-builder.yml
